channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: What We’ve Learned From 10 Days of War - The New York Times
item.description:
1. What We’ve Learned From 10 Days of War  The New York Times
  2. Explosions in Tehran as Hegseth says today will be 'most intense' day of strikes on Iran so far  BBC
  3. Trump Sends Mixed Signals On When Iran War Might End: Live Updates  The New York Times
  4. What we know on the 10th day of the US and Israel’s war with Iran  CNN
  5. WATCH LIVE: White House holds briefing as U.S. announces 'most intense' day of strikes on Iran  PBS

item.title: Reducing Europe's nuclear energy sector was 'strategic mistake', EU chief says - Reuters
item.description:
1. Reducing Europe's nuclear energy sector was 'strategic mistake', EU chief says  Reuters
  2. EU Made a ‘Mistake’ in Phasing Out Nuclear, Von Der Leyen Says  Bloomberg.com
  3. Today we are presenting a new European strategy for Small Modular Reactors. Our goal is simple. We want this new technology to be operational in Europe by the early 2030s. And to back this we will create a €200M guarantee, to support private investment i  x.com
  4. EU Chief, Macron Say Mideast War Exposes Europe Energy Vulnerability  Barron's
  5. EU chief: Phasing out nuclear power was 'strategic mistake'  DW.com

item.title: Iraq war’s aftermath was a disaster for the US – the Iran war is headed in the same direction - The Conversation
